CopilotDigest._CopilotProExample: To use GitHub Copilot Pro models, set ApiUrl to 'https://api.githubcopilot.com' and use a PAT/OAuth token with Copilot access. Available models include gpt-4o, o1-mini, claude-3.5-sonnet, etc.
